summary: Planned conservative PR-inventory classification for 10 listed refs. No shared canonical was chosen because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. One security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling; two refs lack hydrated live state and need a refreshed preflight before classification.

actions.reason: Open draft PR with focused non-security work and no hydrated canonical or duplicate target; keep as independent inventory item.

Open contributor PR has unique implementation and proof gap; no closure/merge action is permitted or justified in this inventory shard.

Focused draft PR should stay open for maintainer review rather than be deduped or closed.
Independent availability/session-state fix candidate with unavailable linked issue and no safe closure/merge path in plan mode.
